texto: I think solitude is a really positive thing. I cherish solitude immensely. In today’s society, there’s so much pressure to communicate, eat out, be friends with people. Why can’t you read a book on your own? Why have you got to have a book club?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Nicky Wire que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “I think solitude is a really positive thing. I cherish solitude immensely. In today’s society, th…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, solitude, think, com foco em termino e reflexao.
